SEARCH
Package gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.segment

Class IzDetail

java.lang.Object
gov.cdc.izgw.v2tofhir.segment.IzDetail
public class IzDetail extends Object
This class is used for parsers that may generate an Immunization or ImmunizationRecommendation resources based on message context clues (e.g., Profiles used or event types).
Author:
Audacious Inquiry

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static IzDetail
    get(MessageParser mp)
    Get or create the IzDetail instance for the given MessageParser context.
    org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Immunization

    Returns the Immunization resource for this message context, or null if none has been created.

    Returns the ImmunizationRecommendation resource for this message context, or null if none has been created.

    Returns the requesting Organization resource for this message context, or null if none has been created.

    Returns true if this message context contains an Immunization.

    Returns true if this message context contains an ImmunizationRecommendation.

  • Method Details

    • get

      public static IzDetail get(MessageParser mp)
      Get or create the IzDetail instance for the given MessageParser context.
      Parameters:
      mp - the message parser
      Returns:
      the IzDetail instance for this parse context

    • testWith

      public static void testWith(MessageParser mp)
      Strictly to support testing
      Parameters:
      mp - The message parser used for testing

    • hasRecommendation

      public boolean hasRecommendation()
      Returns true if this message context contains an ImmunizationRecommendation.
      Returns:
      true if an ImmunizationRecommendation is expected/present for this message

    • hasImmunization

      public boolean hasImmunization()
      Returns true if this message context contains an Immunization.
      Returns:
      true if an Immunization is expected/present for this message

    • getImmunization

      public org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Immunization getImmunization()
      Returns the Immunization resource for this message context, or null if none has been created.
      Returns:
      the Immunization resource, or null

    • getImmunizationRecommendation

      public org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.ImmunizationRecommendation getImmunizationRecommendation()
      Returns the ImmunizationRecommendation resource for this message context, or null if none has been created.
      Returns:
      the ImmunizationRecommendation resource, or null

    • getRequestingOrganization

      public org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Organization getRequestingOrganization()
      Returns the requesting Organization resource for this message context, or null if none has been created.
      Returns:
      the requesting Organization resource, or null

    • setRequestingOrganization

      public void setRequestingOrganization(org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.Organization requestingOrganization)
      Sets the requesting Organization resource for this message context.
      Parameters:
      requestingOrganization - the Organization to associate with this context

    • getRecommendation

      public org.hl7.fhir.r4.model.ImmunizationRecommendation.ImmunizationRecommendationRecommendationComponent getRecommendation()
      Get the recommendation component.
      Returns:
      The recommendation from the ImmunizationRecommendation resource, or null if not yet created.

    • initializeResources

      public void initializeResources(boolean initialize, ca.uhn.hl7v2.model.Segment segment)
      Initialize the resources on receipt of a new ORC or RXA segment.
      Parameters:
      initialize - If true, created new resource always, not just if missing
      segment - The segment currently being parsed
